segments.text: But now Yahweh who created you, Jacob, and he who formed you, Israel, says:

Don’t be afraid, for I have redeemed you. I have called you by your name. 
You are mine.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: When you pass through the waters, I will be with you, and through the rivers, they will not overflow you. When you walk through the fire, you will not be burned, and flame will not scorch you.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
For I am Yahweh your God, the Holy One of Israel, 
your Savior. I have given Egypt as your ransom, Ethiopia and Seba in your place.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
Since you have been precious and honored in my sight, and I have loved you, 
therefore I will give people in your place, 
and nations instead of your life.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
Don’t be afraid, for I am with you. I will bring your offspring from the east, 
and gather you from the west.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
I will tell the north, ‘Give them up!’and tell the south, ‘Don’t hold them back! 
Bring my sons from far away, 
and my daughters from the ends of the earth—
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
everyone who is called by my name, and whom I have created for my glory, 
whom I have formed, 
yes, whom I have made.’
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Bring out the blind people who have eyes, and the deaf who have ears.

Let all the nations be gathered together, and let the peoples be assembled. Who among them can declare this, and show us former things? Let them bring their witnesses, that they may be justified, or let them hear, and say,
That is true.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: You are my witnesses,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: says Yahweh,

segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: I myself am Yahweh. Besides me, there is no savior.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I have declared, I have saved, and I have shown, and there was no strange god among you. Therefore you are my witnesses
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: says Yahweh,
and I am God.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
Yes, since the day was, I am he. There is no one who can deliver out of my hand. 
I will work, and who can hinder it?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Yahweh, your Redeemer, the Holy One of Israel says:
For your sake, I have sent to Babylon, and I will bring all of them down as fugitives, even the Chaldeans, in the ships of their rejoicing.
segments.speaker: the Holy One of Israel

segments.text: I am Yahweh, your Holy One, the Creator of Israel, your King.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Yahweh, who makes a way in the sea, and a path in the mighty waters,
who brings out the chariot and horse, the army and the mighty man

(they lie down together, they shall not rise;
they are extinct, they are quenched like a wick) says:
Don’t remember the former things, and don’t consider the things of old.
segments.speaker: the Holy One of Israel

segments.text:
Behold, I will do a new thing. It springs out now. 
Don’t you know it? I will even make a way in the wilderness, and rivers in the desert.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
The animals of the field, the jackals and the ostriches, shall honor me, because I give water in the wilderness and rivers in the desert, 
to give drink to my people, my chosen,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
the people which I formed for myself, 
that they might declare my praise.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Yet you have not called on me, Jacob; but you have been weary of me, Israel.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You have not brought me any of your sheep for burnt offerings, neither have you honored me with your sacrifices. I have not burdened you with offerings, nor wearied you with frankincense.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You have bought me no sweet cane with money, nor have you filled me with the fat of your sacrifices, but you have burdened me with your sins. You have wearied me with your iniquities.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I, even I, am he who blots out your transgressions for my own sake; and I will not remember your sins.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Put me in remembrance. Let us plead together. Declare your case, that you may be justified.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Your first father sinned, and your teachers have transgressed against me.
segments.speaker: the Holy One of Israel

segments.text:
Therefore I will profane the princes of the sanctuary; and I will make Jacob a curse, 
and Israel an insult.
segments.speaker: God
